denominator_category_system: manager/sleeve share with approved role language
exact_report_question: Why is each manager in the portfolio, and is the intended role being expressed?

visible_content.advisor_note: Use this report to explain manager purpose, not to rank managers.
caveats: Role language is approved for the synthetic local demo, not real client mandate approval.
Rows show the five largest managers by base value to stay within the summary budget.

rows.Actual Exposure / Key Risk: AI cycle, semiconductor supply-chain, and power bottleneck drawdown sensitivity.
rows.Approved Role: High-conviction public growth and AI infrastructure exposure.
rows.Mandate Fit Note: Owns synthetic compute, semiconductor, cloud, data-center, and grid-enablement names.

rows.Actual Exposure / Key Risk: Illiquidity, stale marks, and opaque private-market look-through.
rows.Approved Role: Illiquid growth, real assets, private credit, and data center exposure.
rows.Manager/Sleeve: Manager D - Private Markets / Real Assets
rows.Mandate Fit Note: Holds synthetic fund interests, real estate, infrastructure, data centers, and opaque private marks.

rows.Actual Exposure / Key Risk: Broad equity drawdown and platform overlap with the growth sleeve.
rows.Approved Role: Durable core public equity exposure with quality and valuation discipline.
rows.Mandate Fit Note: Balances quality compounders, broad equity, and selective AI overlap.

rows.Actual Exposure / Key Risk: Opportunity cost in risk-on markets and short-rate reinvestment sensitivity.
rows.Approved Role: Liquidity, capital preservation, and spending buffer.
rows.Manager/Sleeve: Manager E - Liquidity Reserve / Defensive Ballast
rows.Mandate Fit Note: Holds cash, Treasury bills, short-duration bonds, defensive ETFs, and inflation hedges.

rows.Actual Exposure / Key Risk: Rate, credit-spread, and income sustainability sensitivity.
rows.Approved Role: Income, credit, and rate-sensitive exposure for spending support.
rows.Manager/Sleeve: Manager C - Income and Cash Generation
rows.Mandate Fit Note: Owns public credit, municipal income, floating-rate exposure, and income-oriented real assets.

visible_content.headline_sentence: Each major manager has an approved synthetic role; Manager A - Growth / AI Infrastructure is the largest current manager/sleeve at 31.8%.
